mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) FROM consultation_appointment WHERE appointment_status IN ('CONFIRMED', 'COMPLETED') AND appointment_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM consultation_appointment WHERE appointment_status = 'PENDING'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) FROM consultation_appointment WHERE appointment_status = 'COMPLETED' AND appointment_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM long_term_consultation_request WHERE request_status = 'APPROVED' AND created_at BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}

SELECT o.org_id AS collegeId, o.org_name AS collegeName, COUNT(DISTINCT s.student_id) AS studentCount, COUNT(DISTINCT ca.appointment_id) AS appointmentCount, COUNT(DISTINCT cr.report_id) AS crisisCount FROM organization o LEFT JOIN student_info s ON o.org_id = s.college_id LEFT JOIN consultation_appointment ca ON ca.student_id = s.student_id AND ca.appointment_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} LEFT JOIN crisis_report cr ON cr.student_id = s.student_id AND cr.report_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} WHERE o.org_type = 'COLLEGE' GROUP BY o.org_id, o.org_name ORDER BY studentCount DESC

SELECT DATE(a.appointment_date) AS date, COUNT(a.appointment_id) AS appointments, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM crisis_report c WHERE DATE(c.report_time) = DATE(a.appointment_date) ), 0) AS crisisReports FROM consultation_appointment a WHERE a.appointment_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY DATE(a.appointment_date) ORDER BY DATE(a.appointment_date)
